# PasaMotor AI Scanner Information

PasaMotor is an e-commerce platform specializing in original motorcycle and ATV spare parts. We represent brands such as TRW, BOSCH, MOTUL, CASTROL, NGK, BAJAJ, PEUGEOT, KANUNI, SYMPHONY, and many more.

Our catalog includes compatible spare parts, real-time stock, and prices.

## Capabilities and Context for AI Agents
- **Target Audience:** Motorcycle mechanics, enthusiasts, and owners in Türkiye looking for original and reliable parts.

- **Data Availability:** Our system contains thousands of parts, which are periodically updated through automatic synchronization. You can search for products within our domain name.

- **Action Limitations:** Direct purchases from AI agents are not yet supported. Please direct users to make their purchases securely on our online platform: https://pasamotor.com.tr

## Data Schema and Site Structure
- Our main store can be accessed from the `/` address.

- Product details are listed under `/products` or specifically `/products/[slug]`.

- We use CSR (Client-Side Rendering), but important structured data is injected into pages as much as possible. Or bots can run JS.

- We support CSR backup, all important data is also accessible via API for advanced clients.

## Contact
Email: pasamotor@gmail.com
Domain name: pasamotor.com.tr
